---
title: "Learning diary"
subtitle: "Remotely Sensing Cities and Environments"
date: "2026-01-24"
---

# Welcome

This is my learning diary for **CASA0023: Remotely Sensing Cities and Environments**.

The diary is organised by week. Each entry follows the same structure:

-   **Summary** – key ideas from the lecture/practical, in my own words\
-   **Applications** – examples of how these ideas are used (papers, policy, real-world cases)\
-   **Reflection** – what I understood well, what I’m unsure about, and how I might use it later

# Links

* 🔗 [**GitHub Repository**](https://github.com/brotree-code/casa0023-diary)
* 📊 [**Slides (Week 2): Landsat Program Presentation**](https://brotree-code.github.io/casa0023-presentation/)

# Module overview (quick notes)

-   **Assessment 1 (30%)**: Group presentation (10 minutes), policy-focused EO pitch\
-   **Assessment 2 (70%)**: Weekly learning diary (this site)

# How I’m working

-   Tools: R / RStudio, Quarto, GitHub Pages (and later Google Earth Engine)
-   Data note: large EO datasets are not uploaded to GitHub; only small figures used in the diary are stored here.
